subject: Patrat — small chipmunk-meerkat-like creature with striped markings, beach or sandy setting
description: A small, round-bodied creature with a large head and wide eyes sits in an alert posture on what appears to be a sandy or beach-adjacent setting. The creature has brown and tan striped markings and plump cheeks. Its expression is wide-eyed and watchful. The background includes soft sand tones and a suggestion of an open outdoor environment.
foreground: small brown-and-tan striped creature with wide eyes and chubby cheeks, alert posture
background: sandy beach or open outdoor setting, light tones
